MSO_AUTO_SHAPE_TYPE — preset geometry names for autoshapes

Source: R/enum-shapes.R
MSO_AUTO_SHAPE_TYPE.Rd

Each entry is a list with value (MSO integer constant) and prst (OOXML prst attribute string). Pass a member to SlideShapes$add_shape().

Usage

MSO_AUTO_SHAPE_TYPE

MSO_SHAPE

Format

An object of class list of length 107.

An object of class list of length 107.

Details

Alias: MSO_SHAPE

On this page
